title: Medical devices, drugs, products used in cosmetic procedures - Canada.ca
content:
## Devices used in cosmetic procedures
Devices for cosmetic (esthetic) procedures are generally used to help achieve a desired look or effect. In general, how they're regulated depends on how they're intended to be used. Some products are regulated as medical devices by Health Canada while others are regulated as drugs, natural health products or cosmetics.
Read more about some of the types of medical devices used in cosmetic procedures.
